candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: As shown below, four identical containers hold the same number of moles of four different gases at 298 K. If ideal behavior is NOT assumed, in which container would the pressure be the lowest?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
在298 K温度下,四个相同的容器中分别装有相同摩尔数的四种不同气体:$H_2O$、$CH_4$、$Ne$和$He$。假设这些气体不服从理想气体状态方程,那么在哪个容器中气体的压强最低?

A. $H_2O$
B. $CH_4$
C. $Ne$
D. $He$
metadata.explanation_zh: 当气体分子间的相互作用力足够大时,会导致气体偏离理想气体行为。当相互作用力使气体分子相互吸引时,它们撞击容器壁的频率会降低,从而导致压强下降。在这种情况下,由于氢键作用,$\mathrm{H_2O}$分子间的相互作用力最强,因此最有可能偏离理想气体行为。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The question clearly asks which of the four shown gases would have the lowest pressure under non-ideal behavior, and the image clearly supplies the four gas labels (H2O, CH4, Ne, He). The expected answer format is also clear.
